description: A vintage-style illustrated travel poster showing sailing yachts on blue water with a propeller airliner overhead and a pair of koalas and a kookaburra on a eucalyptus branch at the right, against a yellow sky. Large maroon text reads Fly to AUSTRALIA with a smaller line reading For FREE!, and a line at the bottom reading DHS.GOV/CBPHOME.
notable_text: Fly to AUSTRALIA For FREE!; DHS.GOV/CBPHOME
